1111100000010011 0101111001101000 1 -> sum: 0101011001111100, cout: 1
0000100011110100 1010101100010100 1 -> sum: 1011010000001001, cout: 0
0101001111001101 1100100101100101 0 -> sum: 0001110100110010, cout: 1

0001010011100100 0001011010000000 0 -> sum: 0010101101100100, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
